institution.name: Chatham University
institution.address: Woodland Road, Office of Institutional Research

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Chatham University rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 ($24.0k → $28.3k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Chatham University rose 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($20.9k → $23.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Chatham University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Chatham University rose 23% between 2006 and 2009 (47.1% → 58.1%).
